---
title: "cortex_link.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/node/cortex_link.ts"
loc: 105
complexity: 8
logic_score: 4.95
style_score: 3.94
intel_score: 5.43
overall_score: 4.77
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 3 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [WebSocket](file://ws)
- [execa](file://execa)
- [*](file://chalk)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [*](file://node:fs)
- [fileURLToPath](file://node:url)
- [activePersona](file://../tools/pennyone/personaRegistry.js)

### Exports
- `__dirname`
- `PROJECT_ROOT`
- `DAEMON_ENTRYPOINT`
- `KEY_FILE`
- `port`
- `CortexLink`
- `isUp`
- `maxRetries`
- `delayMs`
- `i`
- `nowUp`
- `ws`
- `authKey`
- `payload`
- `ws`
- `timeout`
- `response`
